$comment: Regression manifest -- features that must keep working. Per Mike 2026-05-08 directive: main = 'fully validated stable.' Sprint branches stay deployed-but-pre-merge until real-hardware drill validates affected features. /sprint-validated bumps last_validated for features in the sprint's bigDefinitionOfDone. Stdlib-JSON to match backlog.json / story_counter.json / sprint.json convention (no PyYAML dep).
lastUpdatedBy: Marcus (PM, BL-011 Option A applied -- F-007 citation corrected)

features.name: OBD-II handshake when adapter+ECU available (engine on)
features.validatedBy: Drive 6 + Drive 7 (handshake on 3 engine-on cycles tonight)

features.name: drive_summary INSERT fires on drive_end
features.validatedBy: REGRESSED 2026-05-08 (Drives 6+7 produced 0 drive_summary rows despite drive_end events firing). Same bug class as Sprint 19 US-237. Targeted in V0.27.2.

features.name: Sync to chi-srv-01 on home WiFi (delta push)
features.validatedBy: NOT VALIDATED -- prior REGRESSED citation (2026-05-08) was fictitious per BL-011 (v0007 was never designed to apply on Pi; BL-010 closure had established Pi-side sync_log + server-side sync_history are separate tables on separate hosts). Re-validation requires next Drive N -> home WiFi sync round-trip -> assert chi-srv-01 received the delta + sync_history row written. Cleanest validation: capture Drive 8 (engine on, drive, return home, observe sync), then SSH chi-srv-01 + verify sync_history has the new row.

features.name: PowerDownOrchestrator fires staged shutdown (VCELL ladder)
features.validatedBy: In-vehicle Drain 8 (V0.24.1 ladder fired stage_warning -> stage_imminent -> stage_trigger -> graceful poweroff)

features.name: Reconnect path tolerates BT drop + recovers
features.validatedBy: Drive 6 -> Drive 7 reconnect (38s automatic recovery between engine-off stops; V0.27.1 hotfix)

features.name: DTC retrieval at drive_start + drive_end (Mode 03/07 + dtc_log writes)
features.validatedBy: Drive 6 + Drive 7 (Mode 03 probe ran on drive_start; clean ECU returned 0 codes per Mike Q4 lower-bar)

features.name: Stage state-machine latching (monotonic WARNING/IMMINENT/TRIGGER progression)
features.validatedBy: In-vehicle Drain 8 (monotonic NORMAL -> WARNING -> IMMINENT -> TRIGGER progression captured in power_log)

features.name: battery_health_log writes start_vcell_v / end_vcell_v columns
features.validatedBy: In-vehicle Drain 8 (battery_health_log row 8 closed: start_vcell=4.17V end_vcell=3.42V runtime=761s)

features.name: Pi self-update applies cleanly (download + apply + restart)
features.validatedBy: synthetic only (US-258, US-293 tests); never IRL
